sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n82963" key="phlofo/ros" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πηλο-φόρος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n82963.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">carrying clay</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">mortar</tr_>, ib.<bibl n="Perseus:abo:pap,BGU:1290:3" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1290.3</biblScope> </bibl> <date TEIform="date">(ii B.C.)</date>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:7:130" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.130</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Suid.</author> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
